The first time we retained Greg was after the loss of a loved one In an accident on someone else’s property. We went to Greg when there was less than 24 hours left on the statute of limitations to file a claim.

While this was extremely emotional for us, Greg was compassionate, caring and patient with us while we went through the process until settlement.  Greg poured his heart and soul into this case and Lloyds Of London settled for the maximum of the policy, without going to court.

The second time we retained Greg was after two motor vehicle accidents (MVA) within 2 1/2 weeks (neither my fault) with fractures and other injuries not visible via imaging, which is what the insurance company tries to hang their hat on.

I was naive to think that if you have multiple fractures/injuries an auto insurance company would pay the maximum of your policy or get close to it depending on the severity of the injuries.

Greg worked tirelessly and in the end the two MVA’s paid the maximum of the policies.

If you need an attorney who will work diligently for you, take your phone calls and work tirelessly, do yourself a favor and call Greg.

Beyond their professional skills, both Dan Hilbert and Jordanna demonstrated a genuine care and compassion for their clients. They actively listened to my concerns and provided compassionate support during what was a challenging time for me. Their empathy and understanding helped alleviate the stress that often comes with legal proceedings, and I am grateful for their unwavering support.

In conclusion, I wholeheartedly recommend Canan Law Firm, attorney Dan Hilbert, and paralegal Jordanna to anyone in need of legal representation. Their professionalism, expertise, responsiveness, and dedication to achieving favorable outcomes are second to none. They truly went above and beyond to positively impact my case, and I am forever grateful for their outstanding service.

reviews.text:
We can’t say enough good things about St. Johns Law Group.
Our attorney, Hillary, walked with us through a long and complicated construction dispute that lasted over two years. This was a process we had never been through before and honestly had no clue about, but she helped guide us through every step with steadiness, wisdom, and a lot of patience.
When the case ultimately went through a four-day jury trial, watching Hillary and Doug work side by side leading the trial in the courtroom was incredible. Their confidence, preparation, and teamwork gave us so much peace of mind, and we were truly grateful to have them in our corner.
As things ramped up, the rest of the team came together, and it was honestly amazing to watch. Araan worked seamlessly alongside them, Megan’s attention to detail never missed a beat, and Lindsey somehow kept everything organized while managing what felt like thousands of emails and documents.
What stood out most to us was the heart behind the work. Everyone showed up prepared, supportive, and fully invested. They stood on the truth. It felt like a real team effort from start to finish.
Going through something like this isn’t something anyone hopes to experience, but we’re very thankful we had St. Johns Law Group beside us through it. Looking back, it really felt like God’s hand was on the whole process, and we were blessed to have such an amazing team standing with us along the way.
— Tracy & Alan
TLC Home St. Augustine, LLC
Rachael Greene was professional, neutral, and excellent in guiding us through our divorce mediation. She and her staff made the process smooth and easy. Highly recommend!

I had an excellent experience with St. Johns Law Group, located at 104 Seagrave Main Street in St. Augustine. Rachel Greene handled my legal situation and was absolutely amazing. She was super informative, patient, and professional throughout the entire process.

The facility itself is top-notch, truly a five-star location. Everything is extremely clean, including the bathrooms, and they even offer snacks, which was a really nice touch.

Although it took about three months for us to return after my initial free consultation, once we came back, the process was a breeze and very easy. I am extremely satisfied with the outcome and the overall experience.

I would highly recommend Rachel Green and St. Johns Law Group to anyone in need of legal services. Thank you, Rachel!

After my motorcycle accident in March of 2016 and spending a combined 18 days in CCU and then hearing from my insurance company that my motorcycle was being totaled, I thought that it couldn’t get any worse … and then I find that the at fault driver had NO insurance, driving his girlfriend’s car and of course she had NO insurance.  The first firm I contacted would not take my case and simply stated that “you can’t get blood out of a turnip”!
I contacted the McLeod firm and after looking over my paper work they felt that they may be able to help … no promise of untold millions or efforts to make me whole again but they were willing to help! So, here I was being rejected by one firm and finding the McLeod firm willing to help me! What a breath of fresh air, someone interested in helping instead of after the almighty dollar.
Through hard work and much diligence, Donna and Seth of the firm were able to reduce the amount of the liens against me brought by the medical insurance companies (Who seemed to think I was getting millions).  I cannot began to thank them enough for all of their help and Donna’s tenacious efforts in getting all of this resolved.
They didn’t get blood out of a turnip but they reduced the size of the medical insurance pumpkin to a radish! Thank you McLeod firm you are momentously appreciated!

He and Amanda, his paralegal, were quick to reply to questions, we were able to complete documentation via email and our correspondence was done by phone call or email. Lizzy, their office person, is friendly and you can tell she really likes her job. I could feel her smile when we'd talk on the phone

Our mom's estate wasn't a difficult one for Florida standards but she had a second property in another state. The estate process in that state was not nearly as smooth.

Amanda was caring, empathetic and encouraging when I needed support. Amanda and Steve were thorough, knowledgeable and working with them was a great experience, especially considering the circumstances.

If you are looking for a law office and you're not sure where to go, I highly recommend the Zakrocki Law Firm. You will not be disappointed.

reviews.text:
tl;dr -- exceptional person, exceptional service. Highly recommend.

To the reader of this review,

First off, this is/was a new experience for me – I haven’t needed to seek legal guidance really at all in the past. That said, prior to meeting with Steve I had numerous *exceptionally bad* interactions other firms. I consulted with no less than *four* separate law firms in the North Florida area (some rather well known ones as a matter of fact) seeking advice on what was a relatively simple matter, but had some interstate nuances. These firms were either dismissive, disrespectful, or generally not helpful. In one instance, I scheduled and coordinated a conference call consultation with a firm weeks in advance only for them to hang up three minutes into what was supposed to be a 50 minute session. By the time I reached out to Steve’s firm, my opinion of the legal profession couldn’t have been lower.

Though I doubt there are many like him, Steve restored my opinion of attorneys. He is a genuinely good human being. Speaking with him has been easy and natural, and conversations flow as if he is a friend and confidante – completely contrary to the superficial interactions I had with the other firms. On multiple occasions he was kind enough to consult by phone and email, going so far as to review my documents while he had the flu (!!!). During our calls, he has always actively listened and asked pointed clarifying questions as needed to provide the best guidance possible. With his advice, I am now close to a resolution to the original issue that I presented to him. Moving forward, he will be my go to source for any and all estate planning or related issues.

If you are still reading this review – whatever the issue that brought you to Steve’s page – please, give him a call. I’m sure he can help.
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow Joe. Thank you so much for the kind words. I'm glad that we were able to help you and get you answers to your questions. Looking forward to working with you in the future. Thanks again!

reviews.text: We came to The Zackrocki Law firm following a recommendation of a family member, who had engaged them on a different matter.  We needed to get a family Trust established, to ensure the stability of our estate in the future; but we had another issue which generated considerable concern.  We have a disabled son, whose continued existence beyond our presence on Earth, would be irreversibly and unacceptably altered by government agencies.  Steve crafted a strong and secure Trust that ensures his protection, and that of our estate. We had no knowledge beforehand of his expertise regarding guardianships, and their particular requirements - to say the least, we were (and are!) ecstatic to find that his understanding of the issue very profound and comprehensive.  We now are fully confident that our future, our childrens’ futures, and our concerns have been fully secured.  He is a wonderful man, and attorney.  HIGHLY recommended.

reviews.text:
My husband and I went to Steve for help with estate planning on the advice of a good friend whose family had an excellent experience with him. We’ve worked with several lawyers through the years who got the job done, but this is the first time we really enjoyed the process. Honestly, working with Steve was like talking to a trusted friend whose opinion you really value.
Estate planning can be sobering, especially in making healthcare and living will decisions, but Steve was so personable, perceptive, and informative throughout that we both felt immediately at ease. He listened carefully to our concerns, took us through every step with care and consideration to our particular situation, and made sure we both understood and were comfortable with every decision.
The office staff is warm and welcoming as well, which makes taking care of important legal matters a pleasure instead of a dreaded chore. We’re so glad we chose this office. Our minds are at rest knowing that everything was taken care of in the best possible way for us and our family.
reviews.ownerResponse: Robin, as I told Bill the other day, it's been a pleasure working with both of you as well. I'm so happy that you had such a positive experience, and that your mind is at rest after completing this planning. Thank you so much for the kind words!

reviews.text:
The Zakrocki Law Firm came highly recommended to us from a friend as well as when we did our online  searches and reviews posted we were convinced to have a consultation and we are so pleased we did.

Steve is the most personable and professional attorney we have worked with. He methodically walked us through every aspect of what we thought would be a complex estate plan. Additionally it was done in a very short timeframe, which gave us great peace of mind before traveling out of the country.

We look forward to many years of working with Steve. He truly has your best interests in mind and advocates for the best outcomes that aligns to your short term and long term plans and as always, is a pleasure to work with.

Thank you, Steve!
J & F
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the kind words John and Fearn! It's been a pleasure working with you both, and I am looking forward to continue to do so into the future. As always, reach out if you need anything else. Thanks again!

reviews.text: My family has worked with Jonathan Hermes at Ginn & Patrou since 2020. In that time Jonathan has helped us navigate some pretty tricky Estate issues and worked closely with my Father on his Estate needs. Now, years later, Jonathan and his team, Lauren and Michele, have stood by us as we navigate the loss of my Father. Our Family couldn't be more thankful for the longevity, expertise, and true care that Jonathan and his Team have brought to us. They are not just our Legal Team, they are trusted confidents to our Family. We highly recommend.
Jonathan and his staff did an amazing job helping us organize and make important life decisions.  Made a difficult process very smooth with kindness.  Highly recommend this office!

I highly recommend Ginn & Patrou to establish a trust.  The team under Jonathan Hermes was extremely professional and helpful.  Jonathan provided us valuable advice ensuring we were protected. Michelle Todrick, the firm manager, was very flexible and made the signing pleasant.  We appreciate the services.

Losing a parent is horrible enough, but then having to handle all of the legal and financial matters is a tremendous responsibility with a heavy weight on your shoulders. Thank goodness for Jonathan Hermes, Lauren, Michelle, and the entire team at Ginn & Patrou. They put the best possible solutions in place before our loved one’s passing and have helped navigate and manage everything afterward, including every single detail of the estate, as well as an unforeseen circumstance (arising from a previous financial planner’s negligence). Honestly, we would not have survived without Jonathan and his expertise and attentiveness; he is hands-down the BEST attorney we have ever worked with. He answers every question we have and is also able to make complicated legal language easy to understand. Everyone at Ginn & Patrou goes above and beyond and is extremely kind, professional, knowledgeable, diligent, caring, and efficient, and they ensure all aspects of your legal matters are handled appropriately, correctly, and as quickly as possible. Ginn & Patrou is the only firm we will ever use, and we are forever grateful for their services.

Jonathan Hermes provided exceptional service with my estate and business planning needs. He was clear, thorough, and highly professional throughout the entire process. I am confident in his expertise and would highly recommend him.
Jonathan Hermes is one of only a few Board Certified Estate Planners and was very knowledgeable and generous with his time. If you need it done right, he is the guy!

Absence of communication and non-existent follow up caused what should have been a simple transaction to take a very long time and be more stressful than it should have been. If you like being ghosted, calling and emailing the office for a simple update and getting no responses for weeks on end, then this place is for you.

I had a similar experience to a couple of others that have provided reviews on Mr. Hermes. This occurred during the summer of 2024. I had started to work with Mr. Hermes to resolve some estate issues for my parents. After the initial meeting, the man wouldn’t return emails or phone calls. His assistant kept making apologies for him but to no avail. Weeks went by before I started to find another law firm, but before we could set up any estate for my parents, they both suddenly passed away leaving me to establish estates posthumously with another lawyer. Thanks for nothing. Frustrating, disappointing and quite rude.

They started out doing great work for my family in 2020 and then became progressivly worse. They don't answer questions, don't have the paperwork on time and my last straw was to call for a new legal service 3 times and no one called me back. I am done! I found a new lawyer that treats us with respect.

We just purchased a home in St Augustine. We haven't purchased a home since 1996, so we were nervous about how everything would work, especially with us not being locals. Amanda and the rest of the folks involved did a fantastic job of holding our hands and helping us through the process. We're very impressed.
Our attorney, Jonathan Hermes, was excellent at explaining things, reviewing our options, going over details & answering questions.  We would highly recommend him.
Great experience with a real estate closing with my clients here. Very professional, prompt, and courteous. Kim and Amanda were awesome to work with.

We interviewed quite a few law firms to revise and update our estate documents when we moved full time from the Washington D.C. area and are so grateful we selected Ginn Patrou! We have had an exceptional experience working with Jonathan Hermes. His intelligence, legal acumen, professionalism and integrity are so apparent, and on top of that, he is such a pleasure to work with. He did an outstanding job updating our estate documents. He always has great insight, thoughtful advice and good solutions! He also advised us wisely on a real estate matter and an HOA matter regarding our daughter’s POA. He is a very effective communicator. Both of our adult children were in the office to sign their legal documents and commented afterwards how glad they were we selected him for our estate lawyer! Jonathan has given us the priceless gift of peace of mind when it comes to estate legal matters.
My husband and I, along with our daughter, had an exceptional experience with Atty Jonathan Hermes & staff.

Our experience with Ginn & Patrou was extremely satisfying...in short order, they professionally established all of the Wills, trusts and documents to execute our estate wishes....Top and trustworthy people.
The team at Ginn & Patrou were pleasant, efficient and professional. The closing process was the best I have been involved in. Tiffany was wonderful! Thank you all.

Extremely overall great experience!  Aside from the courtesy and professionalism, my wife and I were impressed by their efficiency.  Unsurpassed timely responses and follow up.  I never felt like I needed to reiterate or confirm.

Although my specific service rendered was billed at a flat rate, all my concerns and questions were patiently answered thoroughly.  With absolute confidence I wouldn't hesitate to hire this firm for future representation and services.

Super happy to have met and worked with Tiffany Pellicer and the team at Ginn & Patrou PA. Our whole process was very professional, timely and made the whole process stress free. I definitely recommend the team at Ginn & Patrou, and especially Tiffany to help with your transactions. Thank you for all your help.
Fast And efficient closing everybody was really friendly
easiest closing ever. kimberly was extremely helpful helping us every step of the way! highly reccomend ginn & patrou!

My sisters and I were contacted in California by a gentleman that bought a parcel of land in St. Augustine from our now deceased parents 24 years prior. It seemed there was incorrect information in the survey that went unchecked until the gentleman was ready to sell the parcel in 2021. He and his attorney asked us to sign certain documents to straighten it out. But we didn't know if the request was legit, or if the gentleman was trying to acquire a larger parcel he was not entitled to. Although both sisters are CA attorneys, Florida property law and Florida probate is different. Good lawyers know when they need a good lawyer. So a deep dive into the best real estate attorneys for us turned up Ginn & Patrou. And John Ginn. John took care of it. Period. A very modest fee up front to get into probate. He checked the survey, got a new one done, got the deed and other paperwork straightened out. And got the three of us a modest cash return for our trouble. John was professional, prompt, and kept us informed while he did it. It was a truly pleasant experience.
My Husband and I had a great experience with Ginn & Patrou on our home sale.  They were very quick and efficient with the closing and we highly recommend them!

A month ago on June 30,2021, I had an appointment with Jonathan p Hermès, esq, in order to update all my estate planning documents. At that time, I was told he would go over the documents then set up another date. Never heard from him again. I have called him twice and have left messages. Still have not heard from him. I definately would not recommend him to anyone. I have since gotten a new attorney. Try someone else folks.

Scott and Jonathan are nothing short of great and caring lawyers. When I first spoke with Scott and Jonathan about my case, they were both very caring and understanding and had empathy for my situation, for which I am extremely grateful. I ask many questions, some not directly under their field of practice, but they are always there to get me an answer and make me feel informed.
GREAT LAWYERS!
Also like to note that Bailey is very caring and so appreciated as part of the staff. Thank you

As the broker and owner of Engel & Völkers St Augustine, I love knowing my customers are getting the attention and focus of two well established real estate attorneys. Additionally, John and Scott are wonderful at answering my customers questions and alleviating any concerns they may have during the closing process.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Jenn! We appreciate you!

Having trust and confidence in your legal team for any situation is a great feeling. John, Scott, and their entire team go well above my expectations and handle all my business law as well as my real estate transactions and my personal needs. GREAT TEAM! GREAT JOB!

It was a great experience to work with John Ginn and Johnathan Hermes. Both of them took the time to make me feel comfortable throughout the total process. reviews.ownerResponse:
At Shoemaker Law, we prioritize only the highest quality client representation. However, our records confirm that you, Ms. Holmes, are not and have never been a client of our Firm. Your engagement was solely as a 3rd party seeking representation for an acquaintance.
Upon entering the case, the acquaintance was facing multiple felonies. For a variety of reasons he was ineligible for bond and had to remain in jail.
The situation escalated when he incurred new charges will incarcerated, including violating a No-Contact Order (in which you were implicated), leading to the revocation of his existing bond. He subsequently acquired another felony for continued contact with the alleged victim.
Your claim of inadequate communication is a direct consequence of Attorney-Client Privilege. I am ethically bound to restrict discussions with non-clients. Furthermore, you ceased payment, having paid less than one-third (1/3) of the contract fee, effectively demanding services pro bono. Despite this, the work performed significantly exceeded the compensation received.
My client understood and accepted the need for our Firm’s withdrawal. While I regret your dissatisfaction, my professional and ethical duties were upheld throughout this situation.

reviews.text: Hilarious
reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. Arbogast has never been a a member of our Client Family.

Go with Terry Shoemaker.

reviews.text: Never even got a chance to use them,they made me two appointment,but they made me call them instead of them call me for my own apt,with everything I have going on you would think this lawn firm would call there new potential clients for the apts instead.I know I missed my apt but a system with a apt reminder would be nice to have someone call about 10 min prior to the apt heck even the same day to remind someone would be nice.Pure laziness and lack of professionalism.They wouldn’t even make me a new apt before my court.Which really sucked because I was referred by a family member to use there services.Thanks for nothing Norma and this law practice.

reviews.text: Wow,where do I begin? I was charged in a domestic case with my 17 yr old granddaughter in a situation that got out of control but did not warrant an assault charge. I have never been arrested or even had an interaction with a police officer. I am oblivious to the law and felt I needed an attorney although almost everyone else said i didn’t but i have always been a better safe than sorry type individual.  I literally googled attorneys and Shoemaker Law popped up and when i heard Norma Wendts voice the energy felt right so i chose Norma.  She was the best decision i have made in quite some time. She was compassionate extremely knowledgeable and very professional.  I think i drove her and Ashley crazy with my calls but they reassured me that everything would be fine and indeed the case was dismissed.  I highly recommend Norma for any legal advice or if u need an attorney that is going to understand and fully defend you she is the ONE!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for your kind words.

reviews.text:
I cannot express enough gratitude for the exceptional service I received from Mr. Terry Shoemaker during my recent DUI case. From our very first meeting, it was clear that I was in capable hands. He took the time to explain every aspect of the legal process, ensuring I felt informed and supported throughout.

What impressed me most was his deep understanding of DUI laws and the local court system. Mr. Shoemaker crafted a solid defense strategy tailored to my unique situation, demonstrating his commitment to achieving the best outcome possible. He was always available to answer my questions, and I never felt like just another case number.

Thanks to his hard work and dedication, I received a favorable outcome that I didn't think was possible. I highly recommend Terry Shoemaker to anyone facing a DUI charge. He truly goes above and beyond for his clients, and I am incredibly thankful for his support during this challenging time.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Jackie!  I appreciate your kind words and I am happy things turned out so well for you.

reviews.text:
I honestly can’t thank Terry Shoemaker enough. Minutes before my first hearing, when everything felt overwhelming and uncertain, Terry stepped in and quite literally rescued me from correctional. From that moment on, it was clear I was in good hands.

Terry’s communication skills are top-tier. Clear, timely, and always honest. He made sure I understood every step of the process, which gave me peace of mind during a really stressful time. He was also personable and genuinely caring. You don’t always find that combination during times like these. He stayed on top of everything, made sure nothing slipped through the cracks, and treated me like a person, not just a case file.

I’ll always be grateful for the way he showed up for me when I needed it most.

reviews.text: Terry is an amazing attorney. If you are looking for the best, look no further! He is precise, professional and extremely easy to work with. He exceeded all of my expectations. I could not have asked for any better representation. I highly recommend Shoemaker Law! :)

reviews.text: I’ve unfortunately had to use lawyers a few times in my life. Tim Pribisco has been a lifesaver and goes above and beyond what the other ones have. He actually stays in contact throughout the whole process and knows his stuff. Thanks again Tim.

Norma is the best !!!! She is very compassionate and takes your problems as her own! Her background as a persecutor Allows her to navigate your case in the best possible way! Norma, Thank you very much for everything! Tatyana

I hired Norma for an injunction case. She spent a lot of time with me and really listened to me. She was compassionate and kind and ready to work on very short notice. Due to prior obligation my case was handed to Tim, also on very short notice. Tim and Norma worked to exchange information quickly and represent me. On trial day Tim was ready for battle and well prepared. To say it went our way would be an understatement. I hope to never need an injunction against anyone in the future and never need to step into a court room again but if I do Shoemaker law will be with me.
I read a lot of reviews and felt very conflicted in hiring a lawyer. It was overwhelming but trust me this firm is incredible. Court is their sport.
Norma Wendt is amazing.  She is professional, knowledgeable, and goes above and beyond for her clients.  If you need any help in the legal system, I highly recommend Mrs. Wendt!

Norma was super professional and was able to get all the charges against me dismissed.  Throughout the process the communication was great and motions filed in my case showed that I was clearly innocent. I kept my mouth shut and let Norma do all the negotiating with the judge and prosecutor with her 30 years of experience. The state dropped all charges against me when it became clear the court made an error and the prosecution didn't have a leg to stand on.

Shoemaker and his team are precise, timely, and extremely easy to work with. If there is one place not to cut corners it’s choosing who represents you, this is the place that will help you when you need it the absolute most. Met and exceeded my expectations and I could relax knowing that I had the best representation I could get.

reviews.text: I would like to say thank you to the team at Shoemaker Law for helping me through one of the most difficult times of my life and guiding me through the process of putting the pieces of my life back together after a mistake I made. Mr. Tim and Mrs. Alexine were extremely helpful throughout the entire process and were very upfront about the potential consequences I was up against. Although I didn't give them much to work with, Mr. Tim and his team evaluated every aspect of my situation, and had I not chosen the professionals at Shoemaker Law to represent me, I feel that my predicament may have taken a dramatically different route and not for the better. Thanks to them, I have the opportunity to work towards a better future that I may not have had a chance at if it wasn't for them and I won't make a waste of it. I emphatically recommend that if you are in a similar situation of facing potential legal ramifications from a mistake you may or may not have made, that you contact their team to inquire about your options. They genuinely about your future and will help you through your difficult endeavor. Thanks Mr. Tim and team.
Tim just argued a motion this morning for me. The judge has yet to issue his opinion but Tim argued our positon without flaw. Thank you

THIS POST IS ON BEHALF OF MY DAUGHTER, SHE CANNOT DO IT SHE IS IN JAIL.

GOOGLE REVIEW: Terry Shoemaker @ shoemaker law The reputation of Mr. Shoemaker gave me a ton of hope, however I learned that had this lawyer put forth just an ounce of actual effort, maybe a 15 minute phone call on my behalf or ANY type of negotiation leverage research... I would be in a COMPLETELY different situation today, and maybe home with my children.

I had this lawyer for a month and a half and in that time he brought the WRONG prison score sheet which he said was for sure the most recent, he couldn't be bothered to read an email that explained EVERY SINGLE DETAIL of my case (which I asked multiple times if he read it, was told yes, but the questions he would ask me at the visit the day before my court date indicated he had indeed NOT read it at all), he did not even place the calls or emails to the officials needed to negotiate on my behalf that could have persuaded the DA nor even communicated with my family about my case even though he promised he would contact them.

In fact, from a public defender prior, my offer actually went UP. Or rather it had been dropped at one point but not formally entered into the database.

It is my belief that lawyers and people in the legal and medical and educational professions should be held to a higher standard. As they literally hold peoples lives in their hands, and by not performing their duties or jobs, it can seriously damage lives as well as the families and generations. With my case, the sentencing is at a peculiar range that it is not beneficial to appeal and or modify my sentence,I would potentially be incarcerated longer.

Just a HALF work day of time and effort on my actual case, and my families lives would be drastically different and not on the verge of losing it all.
reviews.ownerResponse: We understand completely that you are disappointed with the outcome of your case.  But a few key facts were omitted from your review.  This case involved multiple felony probation violations so zero jail time was never a possibility.   Also, we were proud to be appointed by the Court to serve your needs at no cost/pro-bono, but you did not financially retain us.  Having said that, we fight for all of our clients regardless of how they come to us.   We worked hard on this case and remain proud of our efforts on your behalf.   We do sincerely hope that once you serve your sentence you will be able to get your life back on track and avoid any future probation violations.

If You Are Going Through a Divorce, Stay Away From This Firm

My experience with this firm during my divorce was extremely frustrating and stressful. From start to finish, I felt like I had to manage the case myself instead of being properly represented.

My first attorney, Neil (who later left the firm), failed to handle critical tasks. Just three days before court, I was told the settlement offer was not signed. I had to personally contact my wife to renegotiate the agreement, which led to delays. There were also basic administrative mistakes, including failure to submit court fees on time, causing further postponements.

After my case was reassigned to Kevin , communication became worse. I received no responses to emails or calls for over 22 days, even with a final hearing approaching. He finally replied only four days before the hearing, explaining he was busy. This lack of urgency and communication was unacceptable.

I paid all fees in advance, including a $2,500 retainer. The only positive experience was with Tamara in finance—I noticed a double charge myself, and she promptly refunded it and apologized professionally.

A divorce is already difficult. You shouldn’t also have to chase your attorneys or fix their mistakes. Based on my experience, I strongly recommend staying away from this firm.
Jasmine Jenkins is an exceptional attorney  attentive, positive, and truly listens. She is always helpful, stay on top of everything, and get the job done efficiently. Highly recommend!”
Dillon Rheuby is a wonderful lawyer! He really cares about his clients! I'd highly recommend working with him!

I’ve had the pleasure of working with J.Akin Law on several probate real estate transactions, and I can confidently say that Jennifer is an exceptional attorney and trusted professional partner.

Jennifer and her staff have handled every case with a high level of expertise, attention to detail, and care for their clients. I look forward to continuing our partnership and would highly recommend J.Akin Law to anyone in need of knowledgeable, reliable, and ethical probate counsel.

I think Jennifer can help with more basic wills but when we had a more complex case with a caregiver agreement needed, we got really poor advice. After some red flags, we consulted other elder law attorneys and learned that the way Jennifer instructed us to handle this agreement was actually tax fraud. And that parts of my mother’s will were done incorrectly. We are so relieved we consulted someone else before making any big decisions financially. Also, we would often go weeks at a time without responses to basic questions and then when I confronted Jennifer about it she was dismissive and rude saying our expectations for communication were too high. When I emailed clear proof that we often had to wait weeks and sometimes a month for acknowledgment of messages from her staff, she did come back on that and apologize… but to gaslight us like that without her even looking into it first was unprofessional. At the end of the day she did refund us what we had spent with her since we did have to seek counsel elsewhere which I really appreciated. If you have more complex needs or if you’re needing assistance with an active issue that needs more timely support, she might not be the right fit for you.

J. Akin Law

Akin Law  truly care for your loved one and they are so kind and sensitive to your loved ones individual needs. Its hard finding someone patient with the elderly community, but Jennifer and her team are seriously the most patient and understanding and took the time to explain to my dad in a way that he could understand. They ensured he has an action plan based on his own needs and now my dad can enjoy retirement here in Fl knowing the future is secured. Thank you Jennifer and her team for your support through this journey in life.
Jennifer and her staff are wonderful!

My experience with J Akin law has been beyond positive!Every one of the staff are very caring and knowledgeable.And Jennifer is absolutely amazing!This group can meet all your needs .They truly care !!

Every individual I encountered from this firm was kind, compassionate and professional.  Brittany Cyr was so helpful and knowledgeable in assisting me with finding a solution for the care of my father during a serious health decline.  Her knowledge of Medicaid and the application process is top notch, and no matter what hurdle we encountered she always had a solution and made me feel at ease as she made the process as stress -free as possible.  I wish I had hired them sooner and highly recommend this firm to anyone needing assistance with elder law.

I can't even begin to explain how amazing this law firm is. No matter what words I use to describe this amazing group of people my words simply won't do them justice. I was referred to J.Akin law by my father-in- law who was also extremely satisfied with them and since then I have referred my own colleagues to them. They have had the same great results that I knew they would. This law firm took care of me in one of the hardest times of my life. My father was dying and my mom was in the hospital. I was taking care of my physically and mentally challenged sister and they were there for me every step of the way. They treated me as if I was their only client and genuinely cared not just for me, but my family also. This amazing group of women are not in it just for the money. They deeply care about their clients and are true professionals at what they do. I continue to keep in contact with all them as I now consider them great friends. So, if you are in need of a lawyer please do yourself a favor and look no further than this law firm. I promise you will be amazed by their attention to detail, compassion, and professionalism. They have truly raised the bar for all other Elder Care lawyers in the North Florida region.

Well it was quite an amazing experience. I had no idea what to do as i was taking care of my mom that had dementia and my dad and he had a heartache after talking with several attorneys and social workers i was given the phone number to J.Akin law so i called and my whole life changed the whole team was so nice and everyone was helping me Jennifer was out helping another person and it was late after 5 pm and she called me and and told me not to worry that she was on the way.She drove 2 hours took care of everything just like she said she would .The whole staff is amazing, kind ,caring and wonderful but Stephanie she is awesome i called her so many times and she never got upset always called me back she's  just awesome!!!!!
Jennifer and her team took great care of us throughout the entire process! Look no further, you're in good hands here!

He went on vacation and did not inform me he would not be available and did not allow anyone in his office to tell me.  When I decided he was not the lawyer for me in that 2 weeks, he kept half of my retainer $2500 and when I asked that he return it because he ghosted me the whole time and did nothing bit $400 in filing after he took my $5000. He told me I was SOL.  He touts what a good Christian he is...  well.. if you say so Mike..
Great attorney. If you want to win hire the best!
I recommend A hard pass

I hired Michael in 2016 for a modification in a case that was from another state, he informed me he was capable of moving jurisdiction before we filed for the modification. I went to him because he has a military background, and that was important for my case.  Michael took my $3000, ran around producing no results for months, lacked in responding in a timely manner, said he attempted numerous times to have orders served- accepting lies from the spouse of the defendant, and never served the orders. He communicated with the defendants counsel and spread sensitive information that made it's way back to me. I finally fired him, after the prior state claimed jurisdiction over the case because he never filed the proper documentation to have it changed. I requested a refund, in which I never received.  He then sent me a letter saying he let me go as a client due to lack of payment. BEWARE of this man and his lies. I will NEVER refer him to anyone. Being in the military doesn't make a person more honorable.

To those wondering why I am JUST NOW making this review, I realized I never had when in conversation with someone looking for counsel and decided to save some others money and time. I would give a negative star if I could.

What stood out to me the most was their level of compassion and dedication. They genuinely cared about my case and took the time to listen to my concerns. This personalized approach made a significant difference in my experience, as I felt supported and understood throughout.

The communication was exceptional—whether it was answering my questions promptly or keeping me informed about the progress of my case. Their expertise and attention to detail were evident in the favorable outcome we achieved.

I had an excellent experience working with Angelique Kelley from Kelley Law. From the very start, she was professional, attentive, and genuinely invested in my situation. Angelique was extremely thorough and took the time to ensure I understood all of my legal options and what to expect at each stage. What stood out most was her honesty—she didn’t sugarcoat anything. She was realistic, direct, and transparent, which gave me a great deal of clarity and peace of mind during a very emotional and uncertain time.

She consistently made herself available to answer questions, provided clear guidance, and handled everything with both confidence and compassion. Her knowledge of family law is impressive, and her calm, steady approach made all the difference throughout the process. Not to mention, she’s a certified Supreme Court Family Mediator, which only adds to the high level of professionalism and expertise she brings to her work.

I’m truly grateful for her support and dedication. If you’re looking for someone who will advocate for you with honesty, heart, and experience, I highly recommend Angelique Kelley.

Ms Kelly is an amazing lawyer. She genuinely works hard for her clients and truly wants the best for them, their families, and their cases. Plenty of lawyers have skills or knowledge, but Ms Kelly brings all that plus compassion and tenacity. I cannot recommend her enough!!!

I spoke to Angelique during a consultation and she was fantastic. She's very kind, generous with her time, and compassionate, while also being extremely helpful and straightforward. She doesn't sugarcoat anything, but makes sure you understand what she's saying and gives you as many options as possible. She was able to point out potential issues and help me to look for solutions as well. I wouldn't hesitate to hire her, and will likely be doing so. Thank you again!

I would recommend Angelique to everyone. She gets straight to the point, is 100% honest with you the entire time and doesn’t leave you in the dark. She does what she says she will and really cares. Hopefully won’t have another divorce anytime soon, but she would be my first call 😂
I recommend Kelley Law. Appreciated their up front transparency about consult costs and easy to understand pricing. Knowledgeable and kind staff, professional and smart attorney.

I highly recommend Kelley Law Firm and Angelique Kelley due to her expertise and professionalism. She makes you feel like a person, not a number, and truly wants to understand the issue and resolve it as efficiently and effectively as possible.

Absolutely phenomenal experience, fair price with fantastic results. I was very pleased with Mr. Beardsley and all of his office staff. I was treated fairly and like family and was able to have the outcome I wanted. Couldn't recommend a better attorney to use in any family matter. I've used him for my divorce as well as custody issues and he's always had my back

Staff is nice and accommodating. Brandon can be rude and abrasive, considering we are dealing with delicate family issues. I truly wish I hadn’t picked him as my lawyer but I felt pressured into it because my husband’s  (soon to be ex) lawyer and Brandon “work well together”. I shouldn’t have gone against gut. First meeting told me everything I needed to know. Brandon insisted that because we were amicable it would be quick. He has been anything but quick and when I ONCE asked what the status on our mediation he responded to me in email to Calm Down. Putting off the mediation date is keeping my family in limbo. The WAITING for this to be over is torture. He should know that and be kinder and more efficient. I’ve been on top of my game the entire time getting my part completed.

Please save yourself the money and trouble by not retaining this attorney. Do your research there are many other qualified divorce attorneys in the area. Joint martial assets were lost in my case and Mr. Beardsley was noted to be conversing with my ex husband's opposing counsel regularly. When an individual retains a divorce law attorney it is to be advocated for professionally and Mr. Beardsley was anything but professional. If you proceed in retaining this atty do so with caution and not before doing your own research.

One of the few lawyers I can recommend completely. The office has a wonderful staff. Mr Beardsley is a man with integrity and will be straight and honest with you. After a year long case and extremely complex he got us everything we asked for and then some. I highly recommend anyone to him.

Mr. Beardsley is an absolutely fierce attorney who is dedicated to YOUR needs as a client, as well as respecting you as a person with unique needs and circumstances. His representation has been absolutely stellar, 10/10 would recommend him to anyone in need of his expertise, energy and dedication.
His exceptionally capable staff are completely committed to you, thorough and expert in ALL the details of your case. By "ALL" I mean ALL. They are absolute professionals who hold themselves to a higher standard of service for the client. They have helped me tremendously across a range of related matters and are always there with help and a solution when you feel overwhelmed. His staff are indefatigable!
It is no exaggeration to state that you are truly treated as part of the family with Mr. Beardsley and his amazing staff, as they are in it together with the client to gain the desired resolution.
The bottom line is that when you need an attorney, you need the best. Mr. Beardsley is that attorney, without question.

I am so grateful to Attorney Brandon and his incredible team for their support throughout this difficult process. Being in a place with no friends or family, I felt very alone at the start of my divorce. From the very beginning, Attorney Brandon  has been there for me, providing guidance and explaining every step along the way. His team has always been available, offering support and answering all of my questions. I truly appreciate how they have taken care of me and made me feel confident throughout this ongoing process. I couldn’t have asked for a more dedicated and caring legal team.

Brandon is the epitome of honesty and professionalism. If you want someone that knows the ins and outs of family law and is willing to fight for you, he is who you want by your side. He went above and beyond helping my son through an extremely difficult and emotional time. Brandon, along with his office staff, were there to walk us through the entire process and answer any questions. You are not just a client with him. You are treated as family.
If you are looking for a neighborhood law attorney I highly suggest Brandon Beardsley! Him & his staff have worked absolute wonders for me & I couldn’t be anymore pleased.

From the start, he always told me “you pay me so you don’t have to worry.” Top tier on all levels!! Thank you Brandon, Dawn, Missy and Brittney.

Definitely wouldn’t recommend him if you are a first responder, he won’t understand your work schedule. Mr. Beardsley is short and unhelpful most of the time. I never felt prepared for anything. The only bright side to his firm is his staff. Dawn was lovely. If you do decide to choose him to represent you, get ready to constantly have to recheck his math. Over all I was left feeling very unhappy with him.

1. Negotiate your retainer.

4. Seek other counsel.

Reasonable fees with great legal services that puts you ahead of the game. Friendly, responsive office staff and paralegals makes the process much easier. Brandon Beardsley Law should be your choice for a superb attorney.

I recently had the privilege of working with an outstanding attorney who handled my divorce and custody case, and I couldn't be happier with the exceptional level of service and support I received. From start to finish, Attorney Brandon Beardsley proved to be an invaluable asset, exhibiting qualities that truly set him apart.
First and foremost, what struck me most about Brandon was his remarkable compassion and genuine care for his clients. He didn't treat me as just another case file; instead, he made me feel like family. His ability to listen attentively, understand my concerns, and offer unwavering emotional support throughout the entire process was truly remarkable. It's rare to find an attorney who truly understands the emotional complexities involved in divorce and child custody matters, but Brandon excelled in this area.
Moreover, Brandon consistently demonstrated a steadfast commitment to what was best for my son. He recognized that the well-being and happiness of my son were of utmost importance, and he navigated the custody negotiations and legal intricacies with great skill and sensitivity. I felt confident that my child's best interests were at the forefront of every decision and action taken, which provided me with immense peace of mind during a challenging time.
One aspect that truly impressed me was Brandon's dedication to keeping legal fees as reasonable as possible. He understood the financial strain divorce and custody battles can impose, and he worked tirelessly to provide cost-effective solutions without sacrificing the quality of representation. His transparent and fair approach to billing gave me confidence that my financial resources were being utilized wisely throughout the process.
Finally, I must emphasize the exceptional outcome Brandon achieved for my case. Through his strategic thinking, extensive legal knowledge, and skillful negotiation tactics, he was able to secure a favorable outcome. I am incredibly grateful for his unwavering commitment to my case and the positive resolution he achieved.
In conclusion, I wholeheartedly recommend Attorney Brandon Beardsley for anyone in need of a divorce and custody attorney. His compassionate nature, genuine care for his clients, unwavering focus on the well-being of children, commitment to keeping fees reasonable, and ability to obtain favorable outcomes make him an exceptional legal professional. I am grateful to have had the opportunity to work with him, and I am confident that he will continue to provide excellent legal representation to those in need.
Thank you, Brandon, for your invaluable support and dedication throughout my divorce and custody case.
He is quick and straight to the point. His team is full of qualified colleagues, who respond instantly and handle any situation with finesse.

Brandon Beardsley's is the worst attorney, he gave me a thirty year sentence attached to a very scary x husband. He allowed pre marital loans to attach to my x, that have my name and social security numbers for 30 years, and now my credit till I am 91 is being and will continue to be abused twice a month every month for thirty years. Thank you Brandon for your great job of forgetting bank statements, witness, and protecting my pre marital assets. Geeze I was divorced when I hired you, amazed at your work against your client that pays you! Thanks again for the life sentence !

10/10. Top notch, across the board. Brandon Beardsley and his entire team are in a class of their own. Professionalism, dedication, timely and thoughtful responses to each and every question posed were hallmarks of his law firm on top of transparent billing practices. Brandon and his team genuinely care about their clients and that was evident from my first consultation through the final hearing. I had the BEST experience working with him and his team and I would look nowhere else should I need family law services in the future.
I wish no one ever has to be in such circumstances but if you are I can say unequivocally Brandon Beardsley and his team are awesome. Totally recommend. Thank you Brandon.

Attorney Beardsley and his team are the absolute best of the best. They are professional, knowledgeable, and truly care about their clients. I am a current pre-law student who interned with their firm over the summer and I couldn’t recommend them more!
If you retain this man do not tell him you have limited funds, you will get limited work out of him.  He literally sat through 8 hours of mediation and did nothing.

I am really not sure how to put into words the feelings I have for Brandon and his team. My ex-wife filed for divorce 6 years ago and after talking to family, friends and other attorneys I was scared to death and didn't know what to do. A friend said call Brandon and I did. After our first meeting I knew he was the guy! He knows the law, fair and worth his weight in gold! I called Brandon this morning Sunday Oct 30th 2022 with some issues and he answered how can I help you Scott?

If you need a piece of mind and the best attorney in town call Brandon before your spouse does!

I was very anxious about having to endure my recent legal issue due to my underlying disposition as well as the situation itself. Information and preparation help ease much of my worrying, and Brandon and his team provided both. In addition, they offered encouragement as well as personal support along the way. I was very thankful to have the matter tended to by a professional so I would not have to interact directly with the respondent to achieve the result due according to the law. I feel certain if I walked into his office years from now, Brandon would remember me, my case, ask about work and my kids, then advocate for me just as he did in this matter.  I plan to do exactly that when the need next arises.

It’s not possible to put how I feel about Brandon Beardsley’s representation into words. But I’ll try. I’m an attorney myself... when I needed Brandon for my own personal matter, which was quite the family battle, he far surpassed every expectation I had. He genuinely cares about his clients. He’s responsive, highly intelligent, thorough, hard working, and over all is just a really wonderful person. He changed the course of my life when he protected me and my kids, and I would recommend him again and again and again. Thank you Brandon, for everything!

I had the pleasure of working with Brandon and his very professional, friendly staff to terminate an alimony obligation while being in between careers.  Brandon took a serious interest in my personal, family and business background to understand my challenges.  He presented sound strategies to minimize my exposure and facilitated a move through a quick mediation by way of a very friendly and professional dialogue with the mediator. Brandon is a mediator himself and is quite versed in the process.  I also learned he is frequently consulted for his interpretations of the judicial code by judges.  I could not have asked for a better counselor.  He's friendly, open-minded, courteous, respectful, strategic and quite competent.  He's the best of the five family law attorneys I've worked with and most likely the top family law attorney in the area.
Above and beyond other area attorneys as well as the most reasonable. Front desk personnel are also extremely helpful. Linda Bolger

Amazing attorney. I walked in to his office looking for an attorney to represent me and what I got was an attorney that represented me and my children. Everything turned out better than I expected but still very fair. Most ethical attorney I’ve ever met.
Mr. Beardsley is professional,  reliable and knows how to work through family law matters to obtain the best possible result. I highly recommend him.

Brandon Beardsley has represented me for the past 9 years and I wouldn’t go to anyone else.

Brandon has personally answered every email I sent and took every phone call I made, (that’s a lot in 9 years) from answering simple questions, to mediation or being in an actual court room I have never been able to put so much trust in one person until I met him. Having to deal with family law issues are stressful to say the least, yet Brandon and his staff has never let me down.

My words can never express my gratitude for you and your staff.

No matter my situation you’ve always done what it takes without hesitation to insure that my outcome is always justified and fair.
Given my odd situation I was in yesterday with my mother and the funeral home, I’m sure it was the phone calls you made on my behalf (again, without hesitation)  that gave me the fair outcome I truly needed.  For that, I thank you from the bottom of my heart!
Also, a huge thank you to Christie, she’s always fast on her feet and eager to help whenever I call.
The concern and compassion you show towards your clients is the best I’ve ever seen! Thanks again, to you and your staff!

Tammy H Weber
Brandon and his staff took great care of my family law needs.  I couldn't have picked a better law firm in terms of value and timeliness.  They treated me like family from start to finish.

I was very impressed with attorney Brandon Beardsley and also his legal assistant Christie. Everything was handled in a most professional and courteous manner, and promptly. I liked how they always kept me in the information loop with regular update progress reports they emailed me. The legal matter was taken care in a super rapid manner, and I would highly recommend this law firm to anyone needing very competent legal services.  ~ Eve B. El
Brandon and his team made the custody process seamless. They were easy to reach, and  were fair in pricing. Would definitely recommend!
Best in Town.

Brandon and his team were really great in guiding me through the realities of my divorce.  They were supportive, very responsive, and held me to a high standard for keeping my priorities in check.  Divorce is stressful, especially when kids are involved, but this team was a true bright spot during a tough time.  I would highly recommend them for any family law issues!

I had a rather complex case involving a property dispute. I was trying to refinance a property. I was awarded the property in my divorce settlement. The property is here in St Augustine. My divorce was recorded in New Mexico. My ex-wife now resides in Colorado.
My first attorney here in St Augustine said the original paper work in the divorce settlement, although legal in New Mexico, did not conform to Florida law. He said I needed her signature. She requested $20,000 for her signature.
Mind you, She had a similar property and when she sold it, she asked for my signature which I provided in 48 hours, free of charge.
My Florida attorney told me since she refused her signature and she lived in Colorado, I needed to obtain a Colorado attorney. The Colorado attorney told me, that since she lived in Colorado and the Settlement occurred in New Mexico, I needed an attorney licensed in Colorado and New Mexico. That attorney told me, I simply needed was an attorney licensed in New Mexico. That attorney want $400 an hour and could not tell me how long the case may take.
My brother, a New York attorney, told me get a good attorney in St Augustine. I asked many people for an hotshot attorney. Brandon’s name continually popped up.
I met with him. He reviewed my Settlement Agreement and said, “This is perfectly legal and binding.”
He instructed me to speak to the title company. He assured me they would execute the transfer in which I was seeking. They were hesitant at first, but on Brandon’s word, I held my ground and told them my attorney said the settlement is perfectly legal.
The Title company ultimately agreed and executed the transaction to my satisfaction without me having to pay my ex-wife the $20,000 she demanded.
I can not thank Brandon enough. I will use him again and again. As others highly recommended him to me, I Highly recommend him to you.
This team went absolutely above and beyond for my legal needs!
About one of the nicest lawyers that I've ever met very knowledgeable

Outstanding attorney with deep expertise in business law and contract disputes. Professional, responsive, and strategic from start to finish. If you need a skilled trial lawyer who delivers results and clear communication, this law firm is the one to hire. Highly recommend for legal representation.

We would recommend him and his office to anyone needing an excellent attorney  and a professional staff and office .

Anish Patel is the real deal. A man with a big heart and will stand up for what's right. I am incredibly thankful to have him on our side.

reviews.text: I’m currently going through a renting issue that I need legal advice on and wanted to weigh options to see if I needed to move to a legal dispute down the road. I called this law office because of their great reviews and their website says they handle these types of issues. I called and spoke to an assistant and after explaining the situation, she put me on hold to speak with someone and came back with “they’re not taking on new clients” and also, “they’re not equipped to handle this issue right now”. When I asked if I could pay for an hour to get some direction on the situation as I wasn’t sure if this is even something I would immediately become a client for, I was put on hold for the 3rd time for around 15-20 minutes and I hung up at that point. I’m a local business owner. I mentioned this because I saw they did contractual work and I may want to use their services since my business is expanding. I don’t know who the assistant was speaking to off the phone but if it was the owner of this firm: Do better. Very short sighted business practices. The assistant at least was trying to refer me to other firms via Google search. I appreciate the effort on her part as she obviously was not getting help from the team. The 15-20 minute hold was the last straw and why I’m writing this review. Thanks for wasting my time. Won’t be recommending to anyone.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re sorry to hear about your frustrating experience when contacting Old City Law. We take pride in our commitment to exceptional client service, and we regret that we couldn’t meet your expectations during your call. After reviewing our records, it appears you were not a client, and we understand you’ve shared similar concerns about other firms regarding the same matter. Our team strives to provide accurate guidance, and in some cases, we may not be able to take on new matters due to current caseloads or specialization, which our staff communicates transparently. We’re grateful for our assistant’s efforts to assist you by suggesting alternative resources, and we apologize for any extended hold times, which are not reflective of our usual standards. Old City Law is dedicated to professional, timely service for our clients’ legal needs. We invite you to reach out directly to discuss how we can better assist you or provide referrals tailored to your situation. Thank you for your understanding, and we wish you the best in resolving your matter.

reviews.text: Tim Pribisco is amazing! He is a very nice, very helpful person. He cares about his clients and goes above and beyond to get the job done. You can always count on Tim!!

Where to begin. I was arrested onbl false allegations of domestic violence. So the next morning I called a recommended lawyers office. After a week or 2 they realized there was a conflict of interest. So they recommended Tim Probisco. So I called Tim and spoke with him. He told me straight up it's gonna be a tough case because it's her word vs. Mine. But we met up the next day. After we talked for about an hour Tim asked some questions to clarify some things.  He's a very straight forward kind of guy who if he wasn't a lawyer I can see him being a professional surfer on ESPN. He's definitely not like a stuffed up lawyer or anything. Makes you feel real comfortable. So after our meeting Tim explained to me what he thought our next steps would be. He also was in contact with my divorce lawyer to make sure nothing would hurt my divorce case because I have young kids. Both lawyers came up with the idea that I should just plead the 5th so I wouldnt say anything wrong that c I old be held against me. Fast forward a few weeks later and I was on the way to Tim's office to plead the 5th. As I was driving there Tim and I had a conversation. Tim suggested I just give my statement. He said I had a strong statement and should tell it. Soxtaking Tim's advice I said I would share my statement. Well with the news that i was going to share more statement my ex wife and her lawyer went into crisis mode. All of a sudden the dominoes started to fall into place. And from the point on things started to swing in the right direction. My record got full expungement. The injunctions came to an end and life slowly started to get back to normal. I felt the entire time Tim had my back. I can say Tim was also very reasonable for his service. I would highly recommend Tim for any legal issues you may have to deal with.

reviews.text:
These guys truly are the best. I recently retained Mr. Clyde Taylor III for a criminal case out of St. Johns County. I hired counsel from another firm, which was not helpful, but I ultimately decided to substitute them with Mr. Taylor. I could not have made a better decision. From day one, Mr. Taylor and his assistant Katie helped me every step of the way regarding my case. They don't expect you to take the first plea agreement from the state attorney's office. They let you decide on the potential outcome of the case if it is a reasonable request. They won't make any false promises to collect a retainer. Mr. Taylor and Katie answered every request I made regarding my case. I received FULL discovery, including all body-worn camera/dash cam footage, along with any evidence obtained by the sheriff's office. Upon reviewing the camera footage, Mr. Taylor advised me on the next course of action. The original offer was thirty days in the St. Johns County Jail, with probation and fines. Mr. Taylor and I just attended my last court session. The case is now closed. No drug charge, no conviction, no probation, no jail time. ONLY court costs.
Additionally, the charge was reduced to the lowest permissible misdemeanor in criminal court. This is not my first time dealing with the criminal courts; therefore, I have dealt with several attorneys. These guys are by far the best. Don't even waste your time looking for someone else. Hire Taylor, Waldrop & Pribisco!

Joshua Einbinder

After speaking with his paralegal, Josh called me almost immediately, and we met the very next day. From that first meeting, I knew I was in the best hands.

Josh took the time to explain everything clearly and patiently, walking me through each step of the legal process. He always made sure I understood my options and made informed decisions. His communication was prompt, consistent, and reassuring—I was never left in the dark.

What truly impressed me was Josh’s deep knowledge—not only of personal injury law but also of the wide range of injuries and how they affect your life long-term. Whether it was soft tissue damage, spinal issues, etc. Josh understood it all. That level of insight made a huge difference in how my case was handled and how I recovered.

Another thing that set Josh apart was the incredible network of doctors and specialists. These weren’t just convenient referrals—they were some of the best professionals in their fields. I received top-tier care and always felt supported throughout my recovery.

If you’re looking for someone who brings legal excellence, deep compassion, and a powerful professional network to the table, look no further than Josh and J Johnson Law Firm. He treats you like family from the very first call. You’re never just a case number—Josh truly has your best interests at heart.

reviews.text: Mike is a great lawyer he helped me out twice with my case to get back my license!! If u ever get injured also he can help i greatly suggest mike!!

So grateful for Campione Law, in particular Mike and his team for handling our sons car accident case! The situation was very peculiar with out of state insurance coverages causing the amount available to our son to be limited. However, they worked creatively with what they had and negotiated the medical expenses to get him more than we were expecting given the circumstances! We appreciate the team so much and highly recommend them!

Campione Law!! Exceptional service from start to finish.  Mike & Karie were professional, caring, and extremely knowledgeable. They handled my car accident case with confidence, compassion and kept me informed throughout the entire process. I’m very grateful for the outcome and highly recommend this firm.

Attorney Michael Balangue is honest, sharp, and hard working - exactly the qualities you want on your side. He is easy to get a hold of and helped guide me through any questions I had. Highly recommend.

The whole situation was a God send, I was referred by a family member(after an automotive accident)that had used Campione Law in the past. Let me tell you, everyone was a delight to deal with. My attorney Seth Struder, the staff, and anyone involved! The team did everything to the best of their ability and got the job done! I cannot thank them enough, if you need a accident attorney?? Campione Law give them a call!!! #BESTCALLSETH

I can’t recommend Michael Belangue highly enough. From the very beginning, he was professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely cared about my case. He took the time to explain every step of the process in clear, straightforward terms and was always available to answer questions or address concerns.

After my accident, I was overwhelmed and unsure of what to do next. Michael handled everything with confidence and precision, allowing me to focus on my recovery while he fought for my best interests. His attention to detail, strong communication, and dedication truly set him apart.

Thanks to Michael’s hard work and expertise, my case was resolved successfully, and I felt supported the entire way. If you need an attorney for a personal injury or accident case, Michael Belangue is the one you want on your side.

I had a great experience with Campione Law after my car accident. My lawyer, Seth Studor, and Karie were extremely helpful and always on top of everything. They always answered my calls and kept me informed. Overall they made the process much less stressful. I highly recommend them to anyone who has been in an accident.
Michael, Seth, and Karie took great care of me and my case! They communicated all the way and secured a win!

I'm incredibly grateful for Seth Studer and the entire group at Campione Law and the representation I received with my personal injury case. From our first consultation, the team was professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in getting me the best possible outcome.

They handled all the complex legal work and negotiations, keeping me informed every step of the way. I never felt like just another case number – they took the time to answer my questions and explain things in terms I could understand.

I couldn't have navigated this process without Seth and Mike's expertise and dedication. If you're looking for a law firm that will fight for you and treat you with respect, I highly recommend them!
Love the folks in Saint Augustine! They were very informative and thorough with my claim which made it so much easier for me at this difficult time. Highly recommended!!
Seth was great and made sure me and my son were taken care of after our accident.

If you need help this is the law firm for you! I was in a car accident early this year and I went with the popular double name law firm that I will not mention! My car was totaled my ankle and finger were broken, and I hit my head pretty bad and had back injuries! I had never been in an accident so I didn’t know what to do so I went with the so called big name! It was a complete disaster! I could tell from the jump that they weren’t concerned with my case and I was just another number. They did a great job of getting me to trust them in the beginning but once they had my case locked in they did absolutely nothing! If I didn’t call I didn’t get an update! This went on for weeks and weeks. Had issues with getting appointments set and it was just overall bad! It was obvious that they prioritized the bigger cases! I felt they did what was necessary to get my case but after that again I was just a number! Fortunately a friend of mine referred me to Seth and Mike! I had no idea that even tho my case was started and otw to trial I still had options! I met with them and explained my situation and they hopped right on the job the same day. They made the process of taking over my case easy! They work quickly to caught up on all details then came up with an effective plan to get to a resolution! I was very impressed and even learned a lot along the way! After waiting for over 7 months and knowing nothing they took over and worked out a settlement in less than 60 days! I pray I never have to deal with any legal challenges going forward in my life but I am now more than confident that if I do I now have a law firm that I can depend on! Seth and Mike are a great team and everyone at the firm is very nice and helpful! They are the complete package and i definitely recommend them!!!!

The Absolute Best - Incredibly Grateful!

I am so incredibly grateful for my lawyer Michael Balangue and the team at Campion Law. From our very first meeting, I was impressed by his deep knowledge, confidence, and clear strategy. He handled my case with exceptional skill and dedication, fighting for me every step of the way and achieving a fantastic result.
What I appreciated most was the honesty and how I was never left in the dark. I believe he is the best lawyer you could possibly have; consider yourself lucky. I cannot recommend him highly enough.

Michael Balangue and his team are truly the best in the business. Mike is hardworking, professional, and incredibly responsive. His knowledge and dedication brought so much value and peace of mind during a tough time after my car accident. I feel truly blessed to have had him by my side. Thank you, Mike, for all your hard work and genuine care — I’ll be sure to send anyone in need your way. Blessings!

Mike is an outstanding attorney - always available to answer questions and quick to get things done. He is truly on top of his game :) I referred a friend to Mike and I have heard nothing but good feedback.Highly recommend !!

Michael and his team were all time with my case, amazing guidance and professional from start to finish! Anytime you have need legal advice or the best representation, the Campione Law team is my first choice! Hands down awesome team! Thanks again!

Hiring Seth was one of the best decisions I could have made. My situation was extremely urgent and I was under a lot of pressure, but Seth handled everything masterfully. I was very impressed by how he went above and beyond—he was completely dedicated and did not stop until the matter was fully resolved. Beyond the great result, his professionalism and communication stood out; he kept me apprised every step of the way. If you need a lawyer who will fight for you at a critical time, Seth is your guy.

Had Seth and Mike work on my case and was extremely pleased with the results. Not only did I feel like I was kept in the loop, I felt as though both my case and my time were valued. Would highly recommend
The people here are very rude and unprofessional.
