reviews.text: Any office be it a lawyer, doctor etc is only as good as their front office support team. I never received a call back from the Freeman office after waiting two weeks while Ms Freeman was on vacation. Very unprofessional.
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Ms. Strong: My office has undergone a number of changes this year and I apologize if you did not get a response.  Clients and the service they receive remain my  priority .  Sincerely,  Leanna Freeman
Thank you.  It is valuable to receive reviews from people who are familiar with our firm. We take pride in personal and quality service.

reviews.text:
Thank you for your response. However no reason was given to me in the email, not that it matters now but my feedback pertaining to the lack of information you could provide at our face to face meeting while being told to sign on the provided tablet without even asking if I had any questions was concerning. I had walked in fully prepared & excited to work with you! Compared to all the other attorneys i had interviewed by phone I feel it was worth mentioning.

Pretentious & unhelpful.  My very ez to win case turned out to be a slam dunk.  I won the full amount elsewhere.
The consultation with Rebecca was a one-way interrogation: endless questions, zero answers. When I turned the tables and asked a few basic questions, her go to response was "can't tell you that" Not exactly inspiring confidence.
I found friendlier, more competent counsel everywhere else i called. Then, a full month later, long after I'd moved on I received a formal email declining to work with me & no reason given.
I had to laugh.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your feedback. Unfortunately, this review does not appear to be associated with a real name or identifiable client of our firm. Because we cannot verify the identity of the reviewer, we are unable to address any specific concerns that may be referenced.

We carefully evaluate all potential matters and reserve the right to decline representation for a variety of reasons, including conflicts of interest and case suitability. This is a standard and necessary part of maintaining ethical and professional obligations to both current and prospective clients.

If you would like to discuss your experience further, we encourage you to contact us directly so we can better understand your concerns.

Sincerely,
Rebecca S. Emert, Esq.

reviews.text:
Rebecca Emert represented me during the absolute most desperate time in my life, and I truly cannot say enough about her.

Rebecca stepped up, took on my case, and fought as if she were fighting for herself. Her dedication, strength, and commitment made all the difference during one of the hardest seasons of my life.

What set Rebecca apart from all the other attorneys that I interviewed ((there were many)) was her straightforward communication about the process, the timeline, and what my expectations should be. She prepared me mentally for the fight ahead and set me up for success by being honest and realistic from the start.

The staff at Mowrey Law was also incredibly impressive. The communication between Rebecca, her paralegal, and myself was consistent and professional. At no point did I feel unheard or like my case was not being actively worked on.

And the best part? A year later…WE PREVAILED Completely!!!

I will always be grateful for Rebecca and her team for standing with me and fighting for justice when I needed it most.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing such a meaningful review, Kelly. We are truly honored that Rebecca was able to stand beside you during such a difficult time. Our team prides themselves on providing honest guidance, clear communication, and dedicated advocacy for every client, and it means a great deal to know that approach made a difference in your case.

Thank you for trusting Rebecca and the Mowrey Law team to fight for you when it mattered most.

Mowrey Law Firm, and in particular Rebecca Emert, did a great job representing me in an accident case in which I was completely stopped at a light and another vehicle plowed into my car at well above the legal speed limit while simultaneously searching for his cell phone… thus never using his brakes. Mowrey Law Firm pushed hard to not allow my insurance company to force me into a settlement for less than I deserved.
Note to all who read this:
Always have uninsured motorists on your policy and if you get in an accident, retain a great lawyer! This last step is so important…
Thanks to everyone at Mowrey Law Firm who worked together to help me win my case.

reviews.ownerResponse: Saxon, thank you for taking the time to share such a meaningful review. We’re grateful you felt cared for and supported, and that our team helped you navigate your claim with confidence. Treating clients like people, not case numbers, is incredibly important to us. Thank you again for your trust and your recommendation.

reviews.text: I was in town visiting Florida for a month & involved in a car accident that was caused by another driver, and the police officer incorrectly issued me the ticket for being at-fault.  I reached out to a number of attorneys in the area & Dan Mowrey was quick to respond & listen to my situation.  He invited me into his office shortly after & clearly laid out the options that I had.  Being out of state, I appreciated his communication & handling of the case, all the way to the court's dismissal.  Big thanks to Dan Mowery & his team for helping me with eliminating the ticket!
reviews.ownerResponse: Eric, thank you for sharing your experience. We know dealing with an accident while out of state can be especially stressful, and we’re glad Dan and our team were able to respond quickly, clearly explain your options, and help you reach the right outcome. We truly appreciate your trust and are grateful we could help.

reviews.text: Incredible staff and very responsive to all your needs.
reviews.ownerResponse: Russ, thank you for the 5-star review. We’re grateful for your kind words about our staff and responsiveness. It means a lot that you trusted our team, and we appreciate your support.

reviews.text: Amazing lawyer , got the job done in a timely manor , very professional and personable would definitely use again if needed and would highly recommend
Experienced, LOCAL, personal Injury Firm.  Highly recommend.

As a young business owner I have never had to deal with a legal issue before. Josh and his team guided me every step of the way on a partnership dissolution and the matter took les than a month to complete. Unlike many attorneys he is always available and always willing to help in even the slightest manner.

Absolutely the most professional legal representative in the State Of Florida.

Josh Saxon of the Mowrey Law firm helped us with a speeding ticket my son received in rural GA.  Josh did a great job for us as he was able to reduce the ticket cost and prevent points from being assessed to our sons’ license.  Highly recommend Josh and the Mowrey Law firm.
